languages.text: {n}Когда вы наносите удар, рефлексы не подводят Батошски. Сталь сталкивается со сталью, высекая искры. Несколько секущих ударов проходят в тело полковника, но он не обращает на это внимания.{/n}
{n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Когда вы наносите удар, рефлексы не подводят Батошски. Сталь сталкивается со сталью, высекая искры. Несколько секущих ударов проходят в тело полковника, но он не обращает на это внимания.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the Colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}
{n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}
{n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him — steel clashes against steel.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーの反射神経は完璧だ。刃と刃がぶつかり合う。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him — steel clashes against steel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーの反射神経は、鉄の音が鉄の音がする。

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous frappez, les réflexes de Batoshski ne lui font pas défaut. Les lames s'entrechoquent, provoquant des volées d'étincelles. Le corps du colonel se fait lacérer à plusieurs reprises, mais ce dernier demeure inflexible.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lorsque vous frappez, les réflexes de Batoshski ne lui font pas défaut. Les lames s'entrechoquent, provoquant des volées d'étincelles. Le corps du colonel se fait lacérer à plusieurs reprises, mais ce dernier demeure inflexible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sen saldırdığında Batoshski'nin refleksleri onu yarı yolda bırakmıyor. Çelik çeliğe çarpıp kıvılcımlar saçıyor. Birkaç kesici darbe, Albay'ın vücuduna isabet ediyor. O ise bunlara hiç aldırış etmiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sen saldırdığında Batoshski'nin refleksleri onu yarı yolda bırakmıyor. Çelik çeliğe çarpıp kıvılcımlar saçıyor. Birkaç kesici darbe, Albay'ın vücuduna isabet ediyor. O ise bunlara hiç aldırış etmiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du zuschlägst, lassen Batoshskis Reflexe den Colonel nicht im Stich. Stahl trifft Funken sprühend auf Stahl. Der Colonel wird von mehreren Hieben getroffen, schenkt ihnen aber keine Beachtung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du zuschlägst, lassen Batoshskis Reflexe den Colonel nicht im Stich. Stahl trifft Funken sprühend auf Stahl. Der Colonel wird von mehreren Hieben getroffen, schenkt ihnen aber keine Beachtung.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando golpeas, los reflejos de Batoshski están a la altura: el acero choca contra el acero en una lluvia de chispas. Varios cortes alcanzan el cuerpo del coronel, pero los ignora.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando golpeas, los reflejos de Batoshski están a la altura: el acero choca contra el acero en una lluvia de chispas. Varios cortes alcanzan el cuerpo del coronel, pero los ignora.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你出手时，巴托什斯基的反应丝毫没有掉链子。钢刃相击，火花四溅。数道劈砍落到了上校身上，但他毫不在乎。{/n}
